name: 05_xauusd_m15_atr_breakout_retest_v1
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, an ATR-breakout level that is broken and then retested (price returns within 0.2*ATR of the broken level and closes back in direction) produces higher win-rate continuation trades than naked breakouts, achieving PF>=2.0.

regime_filter.description: Trade breakout-retests only in lively-but-not-blowoff volatility and with minimal trend strength.

signals.entry_long: Prior bar closed > ATR_breakout_upper(lookback=20, k=1.5); within next 5 bars price retraces to within 0.2*ATR(14) of that level; retest bar closes green above level AND EMA(50) > EMA(200)

exits.stop_loss: 1.5 * ATR(14) below retest low (long) / above retest high (short)
exits.breakeven_trigger: Move SL to entry after +1.0*ATR favorable
